description: Style Note  The temperatures and hemlines are both on the rise this season. Go with the trend and enjoy the warm weather with these fashionable shorts from only.  Pair them with tank tops and flip flops for a summery casual look. Product Details  Brown shorts, has a ribbed elasticated waistband with drawstring tie, tape detail below the waistband, two insert pockets in front with gathers on it, a patch pocket on the right at the back with a buttoned closure and drawstring ties at the hemline    Material and Care  40% cotton, 40% linen and 20% viscose  Machine wash warm with like colours  Do not bleach or tumble dry  Use cool iron Size and Fit  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 40 Style Note The temperatures and hemlines are both on the rise this season.
